task: Make the trajectory training-grade gate produce sellable debugging_trajectory.v1 rows with real code snippets, deterministic grading, repair recording, and quality filtering.
summary: Repaired the weak training-grade-gate trajectory by replacing placeholder evidence with exact high-signal snippets and tightened the grader so placeholder evidence is blocked deterministically.

tool: Original legacy row graded as needs_review and deterministic_passed false after placeholder_patch was added.
agent: Added deterministic placeholder evidence detection so future rows cannot pass with placeholder patch or snippet lines.

task.prompt: Make the trajectory training-grade gate produce sellable debugging_trajectory.v1 rows with real code snippets, deterministic grading, repair recording, and quality filtering.

context.error: The legacy row for traj_training_grade_gate_20260504 passed deterministic grading while its evidence still contained a placeholder patch and low-signal snippets.

notes: The repaired row keeps legacy agent-wiki/events readable and records the corrected product candidate as a new .datalox trajectory row.
The original legacy event is now blocked by placeholder_patch after tightening deterministic grading.
Snippet evidence is intentionally compact: only changed gate, repair, export, schema, and command wiring code is inline.

trajectory.content: Asked whether the trajectory snippets were enough for a sellable training row and requested one complete repair pass.
Inspected the legacy row and found a placeholder patch plus snippets that did not show the grader, repair command, or meaningful export quality wiring.
Original legacy row graded as needs_review and deterministic_passed false after placeholder_patch was added.
Added deterministic placeholder evidence detection so future rows cannot pass with placeholder patch or snippet lines.
Focused trajectory grade tests passed: 12 tests, 0 failed.
TypeScript build passed with no compiler errors.
Rebuilt the corrected trajectory row with exact before and after snippets for grading, repair, export quality filtering, schema defaulting, and command wiring.

final.fix_summary: Repaired the weak training-grade-gate trajectory by replacing placeholder evidence with exact high-signal snippets and tightened the grader so placeholder evidence is blocked deterministically.
final.explanation: The corrected row uses compact before/after snippets instead of a synthetic full patch because the original row patch was placeholder evidence. The repair event links back to the legacy source path and keeps the old event immutable.

outcome.label: success
outcome.command: npx vitest run tests/trajectoryGrade.test.ts && npm run build && node dist/src/cli/main.js grade-trajectories --repo . --event-path <repaired-event> --json
outcome.evidence: trajectoryGrade.test.ts passed 12 tests; npm run build passed; repaired event graded use with deterministic_passed true and blocking_issues [].

curation.notes: Accepted after repair: snippets are exact code evidence, placeholder patch was removed, and the grader now blocks placeholder evidence.

metadata.snippet_policy: compact exact before_after code evidence; no standalone placeholder ellipses
